summary: KOSPI recovers to 5,524 points amid continued Middle East tensions. Nominee Hyun Song Shin emphasizes stability. Government prepares 25T won supplementary budget; energy-saving campaigns underway.
market_drivers: Geopolitical Risks: Middle East conflict driving energy costs and market volatility
Economic Policy: 25T won supplementary budget planned; Won weakens beyond 1,510/USD
BoK Leadership: Nominee Hyun Song Shin signals pragmatic, stability-focused monetary stance
